ground.schema:
Node properties:
User {betweenness: FLOAT, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, following: INTEGER, profile_image_url: STRING, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING, url: STRING, statuses: INTEGER}
Me {profile_image_url: STRING, betweenness: FLOAT, following: INTEGER, url: STRING, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING}
Tweet {created_at: DATE_TIME, id: INTEGER, id_str: STRING, text: STRING, favorites: INTEGER, import_method: STRING}
Hashtag {name: STRING}
Link {url: STRING}
Source {name: STRING}
Relationship properties:
SIMILAR_TO {score: FLOAT}
The relationships:
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:Me)
(:User)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:User)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:Me)
(:Me)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:Me)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:RT_MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:AMPLIFIES]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:Me)
(:Tweet)-[:USING]->(:Source)
(:Tweet)-[:TAGS]->(:Hashtag)
(:Tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link)
(:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(:Tweet)
(:Tweet)-[:REPLY_TO]->(:Tweet)
ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:User {name: 'TechEnthusiast'}),
    p2 = (a)-[:FOLLOWS]->(b:Me {screen_name: 'CodeExplorer'}),
    p3 = (b)-[:POSTS]->(c:Tweet {created_at: '2023-11-15 14:30:00'}),
    p4 = (c)-[:TAGS]->(d:Hashtag {name: 'Cypher'}),
    p5 = (c)-[:MENTIONS]->(e:User {name: 'DataSciGuy'}),
    p6 = (e)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(f:User {name: 'AIResearcher'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3, p4, p5, p6
ground.question: How do the social connections and content interactions between TechEnthusiast and AIResearcher reflect the broader influence of CodeExplorer’s November 15, 2023 tweet on the Cypher community and DataSciGuy’s role in shaping that discourse?

cypher:
MATCH (ce:User {screen_name: 'TechEnthusiast'})-[:POSTS]->(ce_tweet:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(codeExplorer:User {screen_name: 'CodeExplorer'})
WHERE ce_tweet.created_at >= datetime('2023-11-15')
MATCH (ce)-[:POSTS]->(ce_tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(rt:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(community:User {screen_name: 'Cypher'}) 
WITH codeExplorer, ce, community
MATCH (dsg:User {screen_name: 'DataSciGuy'})-[:POSTS]->(dsg_tweet:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(ce_tweet) 
RETURN codeExplorer, ce, community, dsg, dsg_tweet
